message:
fix: arcade/gaming cards cluster — score persistence, pause, i18n, modal width (#8965)

Unified fixes across the 6 arcade cards:

- ContainerTetris / NodeInvaders / KubeKong: persist high scores via
  safeGet/safeSet (highscore-<game> keys). KubeKong + NodeInvaders gain
  a visible Pause/Resume button (P key), halting the game loop so stats
  freeze while paused.
- PodBrothers: switch to safeGet/safeSet to stop private-mode browsers
  from crashing on the raw localStorage.getItem in the high-score
  initializer (#8938).
- Kubedle: swap loadStats/saveStats to safeGet/safeSet, i18n all stats
  modal labels + help/practice tooltips + inline error strings, and
  widen the modal (min-w-260 / max-w-420 with overflow-x/y-auto) so the
  Played/Win/Streak/Max grid doesn't clip in default card widths
  (#8939, #8940). Add MAX_GUESSES / SHAKE_DURATION_MS constants.
- KubeDoom: safeGet/safeSet for highscore, i18n the HUD ammo readout
  plus overlay strings (start / paused / level-clear / game-over),
  replace magic 5 with LOW_AMMO_THRESHOLD (#8941).
- en/cards.json: add containerTetris/nodeInvaders/kubeKong/podBrothers/
  kubedle/kubeDoom i18n keys. Other locales fall back to English.

Fixes #8935
Fixes #8936
Fixes #8937
Fixes #8938
Fixes #8939
Fixes #8940
Fixes #8941
Fixes #8942
Fixes #8943
Fixes #8944

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

e.key === 'P') { + e.preventDefault() + setIsPaused(p => !p) + } + } + container.addEventListener('keydown', onKey) + return () => container.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey) + }, [isPlaying,
